mapper.select: SELECT r.robot_id AS robotId, r.location_area AS locationArea, r.specific_location AS specificLocation, r.coordinate_x AS coordinateX, r.coordinate_y AS coordinateY, r.move_speed AS moveSpeed, r.status_desc AS statusDesc FROM robot_position_history r INNER JOIN ( SELECT robot_id, MAX(record_time) AS max_time FROM robot_position_history GROUP BY robot_id ) latest ON r.robot_id = latest.robot_id AND r.record_time = latest.max_time
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM robots WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_interaction_history WHERE DATE(interaction_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tm_task WHERE status = 2
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM robots GROUP BY status

SELECT rg.id, rg.name, rg.description, COUNT(r.id) AS totalCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN r.status = 1 THEN 1 END) AS onlineCount FROM robot_groups rg LEFT JOIN robots r ON r.group_id = rg.id GROUP BY rg.id, rg.name, rg.description ORDER BY rg.id ASC

SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00')
DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d')
DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%x-W%v')
DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m')
AS time,
COUNT(*) AS count
FROM robot_warnings WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time ASC
